jobs.source_note: This role is linked back to the public source listing so the original posting remains visible and traceable.
jobs.title: Senior Product Designer
jobs.summary: A senior product design role shaping core platform experiences for a health brand working across product thinking, intelligent workflows and system-level execution.
responsibilities: Own key product experiences from early problem framing through to polished delivery.
Work closely with product and engineering to define the experience, not just decorate it.
Build clear systems, flows and interface decisions that support complex product behaviour.
Raise design quality across the team through strong craft, structure and judgement.

jobs.source_note: This summary is based on the public source page and routes back to the live listing for the full application process.
jobs.title: Brand Designer
jobs.summary: A founding brand design role focused on building a visual language that can scale across campaigns, product marketing, partnerships, events and internal culture.
responsibilities: Define and evolve the brand identity across visual systems, typography, colour and image direction.
Build standards and frameworks that keep the brand consistent without slowing the wider team down.
Design across campaigns, web, sales material, events and broader brand touchpoints.
Work across leadership, product and marketing so the brand reads as one connected system.

jobs.source_note: The public listing positions this as a hybrid design and AI implementation role covering creative tooling, workflow design and technical experimentation.
jobs.title: Creative Technologist, Applied AI
jobs.summary: A hands-on role at the intersection of design, production and AI tooling, with responsibility across workflow building, prototyping, technical exploration and client-facing innovation.
responsibilities: Build and manage practical generative AI pipelines across image, video, audio and content workflows.
Recommend tooling and implementation routes for internal teams and client work.
Prototype custom frameworks and test emerging multimodal and creative coding systems.
Help teams adopt AI in a grounded way through training, experimentation and workflow improvement.

jobs.source_note: The public source describes this as an innovation role spanning product prototyping, interface thinking and AI-enabled systems design.
jobs.title: Creative Technologist
jobs.summary: A product innovation role turning strategic opportunities into scalable prototypes, bridging UX thinking, AI-enabled systems and technical delivery.
responsibilities: Rapidly design and build MVPs using AI development tools, LLM APIs and automation workflows.
Define scalable architecture, data flow and technical boundaries for new initiatives.
Design trustworthy interfaces for internal and customer-facing platforms.
Translate business direction into buildable product and system decisions.

jobs.source_note: This role is restricted to LATAM-based candidates and the source page makes that location requirement explicit.
jobs.title: Motion Designer
jobs.summary: A social-first motion role centred on short-form content, platform-native editing and performance-led visual storytelling.
responsibilities: Edit short-form and long-form content for platforms including Instagram, TikTok, YouTube and LinkedIn.
Use motion graphics, transitions and sound to strengthen story, pace and performance.
Work with creative and strategy teams to keep output aligned to channel behaviour and campaign goals.
Manage a disciplined post-production workflow across multiple fast-moving projects.

jobs.source_note: The public listing describes this as a remote motion role for B2B SaaS explainer work, with a location restriction to Malaysia.
jobs.title: Motion Designer
jobs.summary: A motion design role focused on B2B SaaS explainer work, with an emphasis on storyboarding, UI motion and polished end-to-end execution.
responsibilities: Translate scripts into clear storyboards and structured visual sequences.
Produce complete explainer videos with strong pacing and visual hierarchy.
Animate UI, icons and walkthrough moments using Adobe After Effects.
Refine concepts with stakeholders while keeping output aligned to brand and product tone.
